title: Timeline Widget Grouped by Person - Does not keep items from the same board together.

posts.author: torrie (Torrie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

I cannot seem to figure out why my Dashboard Timeline widget, when grouped by team member, does not keep items from the same board in the same line, or at least remotely the same line.

Right now I have them colored by their board, but it still incredibly difficult to read, even with only 16 boards connected.

Is there a way to apply a secondary grouping so that it sorts by person, and within that person, sorts by board?

Otherwise, this is unhelpful.

Screenshot 2023-10-08 at 8.51.51 PM2430×982 305 KB
